title: orthodon angustifolius
intro: Orthodon angustifolius, also known as Narrow-leaved Orthodon, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae, commonly found in Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Orthodon angustifolius include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, making it a valuable herb in herbal medicine. Orthodon angustifolius can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal purposes.
